blended.narrative: Bluewood is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,045 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 18.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 43".
